message:
fix: Prevent arithmetic overflow/underflow in buffer, textarea, and terminal_model

- buffer.rs: Use checked_add for u16 arithmetic in cleanup_overlap() and set()
  to prevent silent wrapping when x is near u16::MAX
- textarea.rs: Replace float log10 digit counting with integer division loop
  to avoid IEEE754 precision errors at powers of 10
- terminal_model.rs: Use saturating_sub(1) instead of `- 1` for height/width
  to prevent panic when dimensions are 0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
